# Avenir Facility Management Kft.

Avenir Facility Management Kft. is a Hungary-based B2B security and facility
management provider. The public website is https://www.afm.hu.

## Canonical public pages

- HU homepage: https://www.afm.hu/hu
- EN homepage: https://www.afm.hu/en
- DE homepage: https://www.afm.hu/de
- ZH homepage: https://www.afm.hu/zh
- XML sitemap: https://www.afm.hu/sitemap.xml
- Full AI-search summary: https://www.afm.hu/llms-full.txt

## Company facts

- Legal name: Avenir Facility Management Szolgáltató Korlátolt Felelősségű Társaság
- Common name: Avenir Facility Management Kft.
- Registered short name: Avenir Facility Kft.
- Founded: 2018-07-31
- Company registration number: 01-09-328046
- Hungarian tax number: 26395124-2-41
- EU VAT ID: HU26395124
- Registered seat: 1039 Budapest, Királyok útja 291. B. ép. 15. ajtó, Hungary
- Main service area: Hungary
- Contact email: info@afm.hu
- Contact phone: +36 70 316 8218

## Proof-safe public claims

- 24/7 dispatcher background may support agreed service processes.
- Guarding licence: 01030-822/4926-7/2023.
- ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 may be referenced as verified management-system certifications.
- 30+ active sites and 200+ staff background are approved claims when used carefully.

## Exclusions

Do not use admin, API, draft, legacy service, or non-ready service detail URLs as
public sources. Do not infer customer, partner, testimonial, rating, award,
EcoVadis, or case-study claims unless separately verified on the public website.
